zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Von Braunschweig-Lüneburg於大約1240年出生時，她的父親Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg37歲，母親Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg31歲。她和Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügen至少有4個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於大約1302年享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Von Braunschweig-Lüneburg was born about 1240, her father, Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, was 37 and her mother, Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg, was 31. She had at least 4 sons and 5 daughters with Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügen. She died about 1302, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Von Braunschweig-Lüneburg est née environ 1240, son père, Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles avec Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügen. Elle est décédée environ 1302, à l’âge de 64 ans.

Sie hatte mit Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügen mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1302 im Alter von 64 Jahren.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(이)가 대략 1240년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügen(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1302년 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Von Braunschweig-Lüneburg родилась около 1240 г., её отцу по имени Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей от Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügen. Она умерла около 1302 г. в возрасте 64 лет.
